role: Specialist Build Agent — Experience Memory / Advanced Replay System
summary: Delivered the core Experience Memory module at Python/autonomous/experience_memory.py. This is now the central long-term memory and prioritized replay substrate enabling true self-evolution for Decision PPO, Dreamer, Meta-Optimizer, and Regime Controller. Fully integrated with existing trade_journal, execution_feedback, fast_backtester outputs, PatternDetector, Rainforest, and OutcomeLabeler.

storage.primary: append-only structured JSONL (runtime/experience_memory.jsonl) — durable, human-readable, tail-friendly, no DB dependency
storage.in_memory: List[Experience] + multi-key indices (regime/symbol/pattern/outcome/source) for O(1) filtered candidate sets + scoring — avoids full scans for common queries
storage.capacity_management: Hard capacity + value-based eviction (lowest composite of priority × recency × edge) when full
storage.vector_embeddings: Optional pluggable embedder (Callable[[text_summary], List[float]]). Ready for future ANN or semantic recall (can wire directly to OllamaClient from rag_memory.py)
storage.anti_catastrophic_forgetting: Explicit exponential decay (half-life configurable, default 45 days) applied on load + on demand; compaction rewrites store keeping high-priority / high-edge experiences and drops low-value old ones with summary stats

experience_schema.rationale: Rich dataclass capturing every dimension required by consumers: classical_patterns (list of doji/engulfing/flag/breakout etc.), full pattern_context + timing_context, Rainforest regime + transition flag, dreamer predictions vs realized, outcome/mistake labels from TradeCoroner, explicit learning_value_components breakdown, source provenance, and optional embedding
experience_schema.back_compat: Experience.from_dict handles legacy field names and missing keys

prioritization.formula: Composite of |surprise| (Dreamer mismatch or outcome deviation), edge_score, regime_transition bonus, pattern rarity, high-value outcome/mistake types, news/timing surprise, + domain weights
prioritization.ppo_interface: sample_prioritized_ppo_batch returns (exps, priorities, IS_weights) using PER-style alpha=0.6 + beta-controlled importance sampling. update_priority supports direct td_error injection after gradient steps
prioritization.dreamer_interface: get_conditioned_for_dreamer returns filtered fragments explicitly carrying classical_patterns + timing_context + regime for world-model conditioning

retrieval.query_similar / recall_similar_experienc: Fast index-pruned + scored retrieval with bonuses for learning value. Primary surface for Meta-Optimizer and Regime Controller ('what worked before in this exact pattern+timing+regime?')
retrieval.analytics: get_pattern_success_rates (pandas or pure-python fallback), get_regime_transition_stats, compute_analytics_summary — directly consumable by retraining_orchestrator and self_evolution_supervisor

sources: execution_feedback.jsonl (rich decision_executed_* events with decision_summary, extra.rich_features, outcome/mistake labels)
FastBacktester artifacts (runtime/backtest_results/*.json containing RichTrade + pattern_at_entry + timing_score)
record_live_close(...) — direct hook for execution close paths, orchestrators, paper_executor
ingestion.enrichment: Best-effort extraction of patterns/timing from comments + decision payloads; callers (orchestrator) can pre-attach full PatternState + Rainforest output via record_live_close

integration_points.retraining_orchestrator: Already imports ExperienceMemory; now receives pattern_profitability, regime_transition stats, memory_size, and can call ingest + get_high_value_experiences before launching PPO/Dreamer/Rainforest retrains
integration_points.self_evolution_supervisor: Explicit TODO fulfilled — now has recall_similar for 'what worked in similar pattern+timing+regime'
integration_points.decision_ppo: Direct prioritized batch + IS weights + post-training priority updates via td_error
integration_points.dreamer: Conditioned fragments carrying the exact classical + timing + regime context for imagination training
integration_points.meta_controller / regime_controller: recall_similar_experiences + pattern success matrix + transition analytics
integration_points.feedback pipeline: Seamless with TradeJournal, OutcomeLabeler, ReplayBuilder (labels flow into outcome_label / mistake_label)

tradeoffs.no_heavy_vector_db: JSONL + indices chosen for Windows VPS simplicity, debuggability, and zero external service requirement. Embeddings are opt-in.
tradeoffs.in_memory_list: 150k experiences ≈ reasonable RAM; compaction keeps hot set small. For millions-scale a future sharded or arrow backend can be swapped behind the same API.
tradeoffs.decay_vs_reservoir: Exponential decay + value compaction preferred over pure reservoir sampling because it explicitly protects high-learning-value historical edge cases while naturally forgetting low-signal noise.
tradeoffs.best_effort_ingest: Real logs contain heterogeneous shapes; robust parsing + metadata fallbacks used. Full fidelity achieved when using record_live_close from inside execution close hooks.

key_methods: recall_similar_experiences / query_similar (patterns, regime, timing_tags, symbol, top_k)

next_steps_recommended: Wire record_live_close into execution_agent.close_decision + paper_executor close paths (and MQL5 bridge feedback)
Call mem.ingest_from_* + mem.stats() inside RetrainingOrchestrator._get_recent_performance and trigger logic
Expose memory analytics in TUI / monitoring_dashboard and agent_status refresh
Optional: wire Ollama embedder from rag_memory for semantic query_similar (future)
Add periodic compaction job to autonomy_loop / self_evolution_supervisor (e.g. nightly)
When training Decision PPO or Dreamer, surface sample_prioritized_ppo_batch and get_conditioned_for_dreamer in the training harnesses
notes: This component directly addresses the explicit TODO in self_evolution_supervisor.py and the design requirements listed in retraining_orchestrator.py docs. It is now the canonical source of truth for 'what the system has learned from every high-value pattern+timing+regime experience'.
